analysis.name: Chainlink
analysis.summary: LINK近期因世界杯预言机合作等利好但价格持续下跌，面临解锁抛压和宏观流动性不足，短期风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破7.5美元或解锁消息引发恐慌性抛售，则逻辑失效。

catalysts: FIFA世界杯2026官方预言机合作，提升品牌和采用率
CCIP跨链协议持续获得机构合作（如Swift、Mastercard）
RWA和DeFi领域对预言机需求增长

latestNews.title: Chainlink powers official FIFA World Cup 2026 prediction markets but LINK token trades near 90-day lows.
latestNews.reason: 利好合作但价格未反映，市场情绪低迷。

latestNews.title: Massive Chainlink Token Unlock Sparks Sell-Off Fears
latestNews.reason: 大量代币解锁可能引发抛售压力。

latestNews.title: Chainlink Price Today and Why LINK Is Riding the DeFi and RWA Rotation
latestNews.reason: DeFi和RWA轮动可能带来资金流入。

fundamentals: 预言机赛道龙头，市场份额领先
CCIP跨链协议是重要增长点
与多家传统金融机构合作，机构采用度高
代币总供应量10亿，流通约7.27亿，未来有解锁压力
marketRead: 24小时价格下跌0.8%，7日上涨1.27%，但30日下跌15.3%，处于90日低点附近
成交量约2.28亿美元，流动性充足但买盘乏力
ATH为52.7美元，当前价格8美元，跌幅84.8%，估值处于历史低位
risks: 代币解锁事件可能引发抛售
世界杯合作利好已兑现，缺乏新催化剂
整体市场情绪偏弱，资金轮动至其他板块
价格持续下跌可能触发止损盘
watchlist: 代币解锁具体时间和数量
世界杯期间预言机使用量数据
LINK价格能否站稳8美元支撑
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地区限制无法获取，使用CoinGecko数据
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分为自媒体，需交叉验证

profile.name: Chainlink
profile.description: Chainlink is the industry-standard decentralized oracle network that solves the "oracle problem" by connecting smart contracts with real-world data. Blockchains cannot access external information on their own, so Chainlink acts as a secure bridge, enabling smart contracts to react to real-world events using verified, tamper-proof data. It is widely considered one of the first decentralized oracle networks and is the market leader in bringing off-chain data on-chain. The platform operates through a decentralized network of nodes that fetch, validate, and deliver data to smart contracts. When a contract requests information like a stock price, a committee of independent nodes retrieves and aggregates the data to reach consensus, then delivers a single trustworthy answer. Chainlink offers a suite of services including Data Feeds for asset prices, CCIP for cross-chain token transfers and messaging, Automation for triggering smart contract functions, and Proof of Reserve for verifying asset collateralization. Chainlink has established itself as critical infrastructure for both DeFi and institutional adoption, with partnerships including Swift, Euroclear, Mastercard, UBS, ANZ, Fidelity I
